detail_desc:
The guardian is a stone devil, a hideous creation from the dark laboratories
of Hell.  Its black eyes stare into your soul with a hunger that makes you
shiver.  The guardian stands motionless before you.  Its rough gray skin looks
impervious to normal weapons.
long_desc: A Guardian of Hell stands here keeping you the hell out.

detail_desc: A large sparkly pile of gold coins.
long_desc: A pile of gold coins lies on the ground.

detail_desc:
This is the most handsome male you have ever seen.  His naked body makes
your mouth water.
long_desc: The male demon Dee lies on the bed here waiting to please you.

detail_desc:
This is the most beautiful female you have ever seen.  The curves of her
naked body make you sweat, and babble uncontrollably.
long_desc: The female demon Dee lies on the bed here waiting to please you.

detail_desc: This gold bar must be worth bucks!
long_desc: A shiny gold bar lies on the ground.

detail_desc: You see a golden crusted pot pie filled with chicken and vegetables.
long_desc: A yummy looking chicken pot pie is here on the ground.

detail_desc: You see a golden crusted pot pie filled with beef and vegetables.
long_desc: A yummy looking beef pot pie is here on the ground.

detail_desc: You see a golden crusted pot pie filled with vegetables.
long_desc: A yummy looking vegetable pot pie is here on the ground.

detail_desc:
You see a faint silhouette of a person.  Looking closely at it you can
barely make out features that would identify it as the person it was in life.
long_desc: A damned soul wanders aimlessly here.

detail_desc:
You see a unrecognizable person going through unheard of and indescribable
torture.  It screams out at you in pain and terror.
long_desc: A tortured soul screams out in pain.

detail_desc:
This poor soul looks as if he has been chewed on and been spit out.  It
writhes in agony and pain as it gasps frantically for Death to answer its
desperate plea...
long_desc: A half-eaten person lies here writhing in agony.

detail_desc:
The wall consist of graying and sinewy flesh - faces, hands, broken bones,
feet, and toes jutting from the surface.  You hear low moans of horror, pain,
and sorrow issuing from the walls.
long_desc: A wall stands here. Its surface seems to move and come to life...

detail_desc:
Rotting flesh and gore drops from the bones of this creature.  Its decaying
eyes stare at you intently as it sees only you delicious and juicy brain.
long_desc: A skeletal warrior wanders the planes of hell.

detail_desc:
The blood arm of some poor luckless individual.  The stench of the gore
covered limb makes you want to retch.
long_desc: A bloody severed arm lies here.

detail_desc: This bloody foot definitely wasn't a lucky one.
long_desc: A bloody severed foot lies here.

detail_desc:
I wonder how the person that lost this smells...  Hopefully not as bad as
this nose does...
long_desc: A bloody severed nose lies here.

detail_desc: You see gallons and gallons of thick red blood gurgling in the fountain.
long_desc: The blood in the fountain gurgles merrily.

detail_desc:
This soul is definitely clueless to where it is.  He holds a ticket that
reads #14349023402342039840293481234900049.
long_desc: A lost soul stands here looking lost.

detail_desc:
This once used to be a person.  Now it is only a charred and smoking hulk
that is being burned for eternity...  I screams out as the flames lick at its
body and devour its flesh...
long_desc: A crispy critter is here being burned to death.

detail_desc:
Stringy bits of flesh blow gently in the breeze.  The bones rattle as you
walk by them.
long_desc: A decaying pile of bones lies here on the ground.

detail_desc:
A gruesome sub-demon who used to be a mortal.  It is a semi-intelligent
creature who attacks anyone they encounter with nails and teeth.  They are
often fed upon by Demon lords and princes.  Their green and red blotched skin
gives them a diseased and decaying look.  They somewhat resemble shadows or
ghasts.
long_desc: A manes is here wandering the planes of hell looking for something to kill.

detail_desc:
This is a sad individual.  He smells strongly of the rotten food that has
been thrown at him.  He sits here chained to the wall; banished to hell forever
by the God.
long_desc: The prisoner of hell, Raiden sits here for eternity.

detail_desc:
She is sad looking indeed.  Cuts and scraps all over her.  Many scars and
burns cover her face and arms.
long_desc: A sad looking individual sits here awaiting torture.

detail_desc:
He is sad looking indeed.  Cuts and scraps all over him.  Many scars and
burns cover her face and arms.  One of his arms is broken at the forearm and
hangs limply by his side.
long_desc: A sad looking individual sits here awaiting torture.

detail_desc:
This very large demon stands before you licking its daggerlike teeth.
Yellow spittle runs down the scales of his blackened skin.
long_desc: A demonguard patrols the planes of hell.

detail_desc:
You can barely make out anything on it.  All you can make out is the flames
of hell consuming it and the smell of burning flesh.
long_desc: A burning fool is here, crisping away.

detail_desc:
He is the typical construction worker.  T-shirt, jeans, yellow hard hat.  As
you look closer at the hard hat you notice it says, '4th DEMONsion Construction
Co.  '
long_desc: A construction worker is here welding pipework.

detail_desc:
She is the typical construction worker.  T-shirt, jeans, yellow hard hat.
As you look closer at the hard hat you notice it says, '4th DEMONsion
Construction Co.  '
long_desc: A construction worker is here working riveting framework.

detail_desc:
She is the typical construction worker.  T-shirt, jeans, yellow hard hat.
As you look closer at the hard hat you notice it says, '4th DEMONsion
Construction Co.  '
long_desc: A construction worker is here working cutting structural steel.

detail_desc:
It is an indescribably grotesque creature.  Its pale green-yellow skin erupts
with blisters and puss.  As you look at it, it smiles at you with sharp blood
covered teeth.  This is definitely a face only a mother could love.
long_desc: A fire devil stands here with a box of matches lighting up poor souls.

detail_desc:
It is simply a large door sized wall of fire.  It slowly inches across the
room burning everything in its path; Including the poor souls that are chained
to various posts around the room.
long_desc: A wall of fire is here, creeping slowly across the room.

detail_desc:
This freak of a canine is rusty red to red brown in color.  Its eyes glow an
ghastly red.  Its sooty black teeth and tongue are covered with green spittle
that runs down its dung covered coat.
long_desc: A hell hound runs free through the halls of hell.

detail_desc:
As you look at the corpse you recoil as you notice its eyes still move.
They stare intently from its bluish face as if pleading for your help.
long_desc: A frozen body lies here on the ground.

detail_desc:
This devil is a mix of bug, bird, humanoid, and who knows what else.  Its
multifaceted eyes stare everywhere.  It goes about its business of slowly and
painfully freezing the damned souls, quickly thawing them and then starting
over.  Every couple of minutes it takes time out to break an appendage off of a
nearby soul and beat the soul with it.
long_desc: A Greater Ice Devil stands here cheerfully freezing souls..

detail_desc:
This poor soul has been encased in ice; almost as if it is caught under an
ice-flow.  It desperately gasps for air for a few minutes and then seems to die
for a second before it is restored and begins thrashing about again.
long_desc: A soul trapped under the ice gasps desperately for air.

detail_desc:
A large meat hook is imbedded deep within the back of the body.  You see
small white maggots eating away at the body.  The flesh seems to move and
wriggle with a life of its own...
long_desc: A half frozen body hangs here on a meat hook.

detail_desc:
What a cute little penguin....  Wait why is it looking at you that way...
HEY!  Penguins don't have teeth!
long_desc: A small penguin waddles around here on the ice.

detail_desc:
It moves about so frantically you can't really get a chance to look at it.
It runs about screaming, 'I SCREAM, YOU SCREAM!  WE ALL SCREAM FOR I SCREAM!!!
'
long_desc: An I-scream worker runs from machine to machine.

detail_desc:
He is dressing in a white jumpsuit with the words, 'Eye Splean I Screamery'
written on it in large yellow letters.
long_desc: An Ice Screamer is here yelling into empty cartons.

detail_desc:
This huge demon has somehow managed to fit himself into a oversized orange
jumpsuit.  The words, '4th DEMONsion Construction Co.  ' are written on the
back in large black letters.  He seems none to happy to see you.
long_desc: A Demonic Foreman sits here looking at blueprints.

detail_desc:
This very sexy secretary seems to be just sitting here amusing herself by
watching the little lights on the telephone blink.  She is oblivious to your
presence and seems fascinated by the phones.
long_desc: The Secretary of Hell sits here watching the phones ring.

detail_desc:
Just looking at them makes your blood boil.
AAAAAAAAAAaaaaaaaaaaaarrrrrrrrgggggghhhhh!!!!!!!!!!!
long_desc: An office worker from hell is here looking for a boss to piss off.

detail_desc:
You see a rather plain looking office person here filing a file on
someone.
long_desc: A records worker is here filing bad reports.

detail_desc:
He's a jolly old man with red cheeks and a roly-poly belly and a laugh as
jolly as you can get.
long_desc: Santa Claus is here checking who has been naughty...

detail_desc:
The dark black robes hide most of his features, but you can barely make out
his emaciated face beneath his hood.
long_desc: The High Priest of Hell is here eating 'I Scream'.

detail_desc: Its is a wooden bowl filled with blood and bits of flesh.
long_desc: A bowl of blood sits here on the altar.

detail_desc:
It seems to be a lesser demon disguised as mortal.  Fair trial...  Not
likely.
long_desc: A jury member sits here with a guilty sign, waiting for a trial to begin.

detail_desc:
This is the High Judge of Hell.  He has never found anyone innocent, and is
notorious for his painful and harsh punishments.
long_desc: Judge Whopper sits here trying to think of a painful sentence.

detail_desc: Slimy, sleazy and has very sharp teeth...  A lawyer all right...
long_desc: The Lawyer from Hell sits here playing games on his laptop computer.

detail_desc:
She seems not to notice you; But is absorbed in her favorite soap, 'As The
Hell Burns'
long_desc: The Complaints Officer is here watching her favorite soap opera.

detail_desc:
He looks at you and says, 'I think my Kung Fu is no good' and then goes back
to practicing.  He is known to buy anything....  And sell anything people sell
him.
long_desc: The Bastard Hiramoto stands here trying to learn Kung Fu from a book.

detail_desc: He is in a yellow jumpsuit with a large nuclear warning symbol on the back.
long_desc: A maintenance worker is here fixing stuff.

detail_desc: You see a nasty yellow and purple weed.
long_desc: A weed is growing out of the cement here.

detail_desc:
He is a crafty old fart who looks about 1000 years old.  But his figurines
are pretty well known.  He was rumored to disappear around Solace 100 years
ago.
long_desc: Stanley stands here waiting to sell you one of his wonderful figurines.

detail_desc:
This is what used to be a horse....  Maybe...  Its hard to tell; half of it
has been digested already.
long_desc: A half eaten horse carcass is here being digested.

detail_desc:
A large brown and green slime covered reptile.  It seems to move around to
each food item and proceed to barf acid all over it.
long_desc: A stomach dragon is here digesting Big Mouth's food.

detail_desc:
Its one of those really nasty pieces of food in the refrigerator that
disappears and you wonder if it just walked away....
long_desc: A rancid turkey leg sits in a pool of slime here.

detail_desc:
He is dressed in a black jumpsuit with a large nuclear warning symbol on the
back.
long_desc: A reactor specialist sits here checking on the reactor core.

detail_desc:
He is dressed in a black jumpsuit with a large lighting bolt symbol on the
back.
long_desc: A reactor worker sits here monitoring various screens.

detail_desc:
A balding fat man with jelly stains on his uniform.  He suddenly spills his
coffee and shouts out, 'DOH!  ' Warning lights blink rapidly as the coffee
shorts out the control panel.  Homer calmly stands up and unplugs the control
panel and sits down for a nap.
long_desc: Homer Simpson sits here eating donuts.

detail_desc: Mmmmmm...  Don't you just want to take a bite?
long_desc: A nice slice of devils food cake is here waiting to be eaten.

detail_desc: You spots you and screams, 'Git awa froom mi food!  ' 'I'll kill you!  '
long_desc: A mad cook is here cooking up a storm.

detail_desc: Ugly!
long_desc: A frantic lady is here tearing her hair out looking for a sale.

detail_desc: Wau, dont get too close, he seems to be glowing!
long_desc: A nuclear technician is here fiddling with his rad suit.

detail_desc: I can't see it.  Can you?
long_desc: A stray proton is here whizzing about.

detail_desc: Eagle eyes?
long_desc: Radiation is here doing unknown things to you.

detail_desc:
He kinda reminds you of an old Bart Simpson.  He seems to be enjoying the
panic button at the moment; Chuckling happily as workers below on the reactor
floor frantically check dials and gauges while flashing lights and sirens sound.
long_desc: The Chief Engineer of Hell is here playing with the panic button.

detail_desc:
This large black scaled demon laughs merrily as he watches poor souls scream
out in pain.  He pokes and picks at the flesh of the damned who were unlucky
enough to be tortured close to him.  His black taloned nails rip slowly through
their flesh, as he cackles with glee at the sounds of their unending pain...
long_desc: A Greater Fire Demon stands here laughing at each scream he hears..

detail_desc:
This enormous carcass looks as if it came from a small dragon or a very
large cow.
long_desc: A frozen side of beef hangs here on a hook.

detail_desc: A vicious looking pit bull / demon dog mix is here slobbering on the donuts.
long_desc: A guard dog sits here guarding the break room.

detail_desc: Mmmmmmm.....  Steak....  Mmmmmm...  You feel your mouth start to water.
long_desc: A mouth watering juicy steak is here steaming.
